# {{ site.title }}

> {{ site.description }}

Agent Guides extend the Agent Skills format to multi-step procedures — runbooks, incident response, migrations, onboarding. Every Guide is a valid Skill, so any Skills-compatible client can discover it; Guide-aware clients additionally execute the workflow step by step and record an append-only event log of each walk.

## Docs
{% assign docs = site.html_pages | where_exp: "p", "p.title" | where_exp: "p", "p.url != '/'" | sort: "nav_order" -%}
{% for p in docs -%}
- [{{ p.title }}]({{ p.url | absolute_url }}){% if p.description %}: {{ p.description }}{% endif %}
{% endfor %}

## Schemas
JSON Schemas (Draft 2020-12) for the Guide format, versioned by spec major.minor:

- [{{ f.name }}]({{ f.path | absolute_url }})
{% endfor %}
